title: ICMR Director Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
org: Indian Council of Medical Research Delhi (ICMR)
shortInfo: The Indian Council of Medical Research (ICMR) Director Notification 2026 has been released on the official website ICMR. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the ICMR Director Recruitment 2026.

basic_details.organization_name: Indian Council of Medical Research Delhi (ICMR)
basic_details.short_information: The Indian Council of Medical Research (ICMR) Director Notification 2026 has been released on the official website ICMR. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the ICMR Director Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 58 years. Age relaxation for SC/ST candidates as per Note 6 in the official notification.

qualification.education_qualification: MBBS degree recognized under Indian Medical Council Act, 1956, Post-Graduate degree
qualification.details: MBBS degree recognized under Indian Medical Council Act, 1956. Post-Graduate degree in any medical discipline recognized by Medical Council of India. Sixteen years standing in the profession with teaching, research, and administrative experience (minimum 7 years in administration).

salary_details.details: Rs. 144200 - 218200 Per Month (Level 14 of Pay Matrix)

selection_process: Shortlisting based on eligibility and experience Interview
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for ICMR Director Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://www.icmr.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 07-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the ICMR Director recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the offline application for the ICMR Director position is 07-06-2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well in advance to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Director post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an MBBS degree recognized by the Indian Medical Council Act, 1956, and a Post-Graduate degree in any medical discipline. Additionally, they need sixteen years of professional experience, including at least seven years in administration.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Director position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Director post is 58 years. Specific age relaxations may apply for SC/ST candidates as per government rules.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Director post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Director post will receive a salary in Level 14 of the Pay Matrix, ranging from Rs. 144200 to Rs. 218200 per month.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the ICMR Director recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process is offline. Candidates need to download the application form from the official ICMR website, fill it out, attach necessary documents, and send it to the address specified in the notification before the last date.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Director post?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve shortlisting candidates based on their eligibility and experience, followed by an interview.

faq.question: Q8. What is the total number of vacancies for the Director post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the post of Director in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The job type for this recruitment is Deputation.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the "Important Links" section of this article. It contains all the detailed information regarding the recruitment.
